# MDE 1.3.11

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Aligned the editor link new-document directory picker with the Explorer tree visibility rules, including default dot-folder hiding and user-hidden entries.
- Opened the link new-document picker with only the current document directory branch expanded and the current document directory selected.
- Saved the current Markdown file immediately after inserting an existing document link from the picker.
- Saved the current Markdown file immediately after creating and inserting a new linked Markdown document.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Extracted shared Explorer tree visibility helpers so the Explorer and editor link picker use the same hidden-entry filtering behavior.
- Added editor link directory helper coverage for hidden entries, current directory selection, and collapsed sibling branches.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for link picker visibility and immediate save behavior.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon DMG and ZIP
- macOS Intel DMG and ZIP
- Windows x64 NSIS installer
